title: Add Animated Skill Bars
description: Replace the skill tags with animated progress bars that animate to their percentage width on page load.
requirements: Each skill has a proficiency percentage
Animate width from 0% to the target percentage
Use CSS transitions with a delay per bar
hints: Use a container div with a colored inner div for the bar
Set width via CSS or JS on page load
Use aria-valuenow, aria-valuemin, aria-valuemax on the bar
solution:
Create skill bars as
. Animate with transition: width 1s ease.

title: Implement a Lightbox for Project Images
description: Add a modal lightbox that opens when clicking project images, with keyboard navigation and ARIA dialog roles.
requirements: Click on project image opens a full-size overlay
Overlay has close button and ESC key support
Focus is trapped within the lightbox
hints: Use position: fixed for the overlay
Use aria-hidden on the lightbox to toggle visibility
solution: Create a fixed overlay with a centered image. On click: set aria-hidden='false', populate image src. On ESC or close click: set aria-hidden='true'. Use CSS opacity/transform for transition.

title: Add Scroll-Based Active Navigation Highlighting
description: Highlight the current section in the navigation as the user scrolls through the page using IntersectionObserver.
requirements: Each section has an id matching the nav link href
Active nav link gets a visual indicator (underline/color)
Handle multiple visible sections by choosing the most relevant
Smooth scroll on nav click (native scroll-behavior)
hints: Map section IDs to nav links with querySelector
Add/remove an 'active' class on nav items
solution: Observe all sections. When a section intersects at 30% visibility, add 'active' class to the corresponding nav link. Remove from others. CSS: .nav-menu a.active { color: var(--accent); border-bottom: 2px solid var(--accent); }
